plan.failureSummary: The test failed because of a strict URL assertion mismatch. The expected URL was 'https://www.checklyhq.com/docs/constructs/playwright-check/', but the actual URL reached was 'https://www.checklyhq.com/docs/constructs/playwright-check/#playwright-check-suite'.
observedIndicators: Assertion failed after page.ai completed successfully
Deterministic URL check failed on fragment mismatch
Baseline and failure screenshots show identical UI state at the end of the flow

remediationSteps.summary: Update URL assertion to handle fragments
remediationSteps.details: Update the assertion on line 13 of checkly.test.ts to either include the fragment '#playwright-check-suite' or use a more flexible matcher like '.toContain()' or a regular expression.

remediationSteps.summary: Review suite for strict URL assertions
remediationSteps.details: Review other URL assertions in the test suite for similar fragility regarding anchors/fragments.

plan.notes: The page.ai step successfully fulfilled the semantic intent of searching for 'Playwright check suite' and selecting the suggested match. The resulting navigation included a URL fragment (#playwright-check-suite) which the test's deterministic assertion did not expect. The current 3-run failure streak suggests a stable change in site behavior or search indexing.

originalPlaywrightArgs: Checkly dev docs search|Fill out a survey
